classes.purpose: Map source tables, write the report narrative, and review the generated report
classes.content: User instructions; spreadsheets, CSV files or extracted PDF text; table inventories and rows; mappings; calculations; diagnostics; draft narrative; report artifacts and review decisions

security_controls.control: Input discovery, extraction, numeric diagnostics, rendering, and audit-output generation run locally; helper scripts make no model API calls.
Run artifacts are written outside the repository and published folders.
